payload.answer: I found a conflict: I currently have Sara recorded as your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify whether this is the same Sara and which relationship should be current, or whether there are two different people named Sara.

entity_resolution.reason: The existing memory says Sara is the user's daughter, while the new input says Sara is the user's niece. These may refer to the same person with conflicting relationship labels, or to two different people named Sara.

details: No durable memory update committed because the new relationship conflicts with an existing one and may require entity disambiguation.

repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter, and ignore the new claim.
Create a separate Sara entity for a different person who is your niece.
Record both only if both relationships are intentionally true.
